ew_context: Cup & Handle completion suggesting wave 1 or A wave advance from consolidation base - classic accumulation pattern
pattern_desc: Textbook Cup & Handle pattern with cup bottom at 622.60 and rim at 627.47. Handle pullback complete with RSI at 63.4% showing healthy momentum.
invalidation: Close below 624.75 on H1 timeframe negates the Cup & Handle pattern
market_context: BNB showing relative strength despite broader crypto regulatory concerns, with pattern suggesting institutional accumulation phase completion
full_analysis:
## Market Structure & Technical Context

Classic Cup & Handle pattern has formed with cup bottom at 622.60 and rim resistance at 627.47, indicating completed institutional accumulation. The handle pullback from 627.47 to current levels shows healthy profit-taking before the anticipated breakout, with entry at 626.29 positioned for the rim break.

RSI at 63.4% shows constructive momentum while EMA20 (625.11) < EMA50 (625.85) reflects the recent handle correction. ATR of 1.54 supports the tight 1.54 point stop, creating an exceptional 1:3.9 risk-reward profile typical of quality Cup & Handle setups.

## Key Levels

- **Resistance**: 632.34 (measured cup target), 627.47 (cup rim breakout level)
- **Support**: 624.75 (handle validation), 622.60 (cup bottom)

## Invalidation Level

Close below 624.75 on H1 timeframe would negate the Cup & Handle pattern and suggest handle failure.

## Macro & Flow Context

BNB demonstrates relative strength despite crypto regulatory headwinds and Canada's proposed ATM ban. CFD momentum alignment with Reynolds=2.91 supports the bullish accumulation thesis.
